text:
Once upon a time in a quaint village hidden under sleepy-looking clouds lived a timid owl named Olive. Olive dreamed of adventure, soaring high above trees and stars.

One autumn evening, Olive fluttered out of her nest onto a fallen branch. As stars sprinkled themselves across the sky, she caught sight of something strange glimmering far down the valley. Perhaps it was her wildest ambition!

That night, driven by desire, Olive vowed she would swoop down and claim that magical thing—a crystal star. Armed just with her sharp eyesight, she set off.

Hours fluttered away. Olive swooped, soared—every move her keen eyes took her closer.

Finally reaching the sparkling gemstone nestled in a cluster of mist-filled bushes, she steadied herself. Stars winked approval. She nestled gently into its embrace.

A cool breeze rustled the bush. Something...did that whistle?

Birds?!

And there she discovered a flock of fledglings! They had never seen an adult
